mapper.insert: insert into role(name, code, description, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values(#{name}, #{code}, #{description}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser})
mapper.select: select id, name, code, description, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user from role where id = #{id}
select r.code from role r inner join employee_role er on r.id = er.role_id where er.employee_id=#{employeeId} and r.status = 1
